[YOURCOMPANY] has completed the building of your website.  It is now available on our test site for your full and final review.



Test Site Address: [TEST URL]



You will receive one round of copy/text edits, so be sure to review your entire website thoroughly, each and every page.

Please use this document to compile all of your edits to your website.

This is the time to review any photos on the site and approve them, so we can purchase and place them without the watermark. If you would like to replace a particular photo, please make a note of it in this form.

Any edits not listed on this document will be considered “out of scope” and billed separately, on an hourly basis.

Your website navigation and architecture were approved when you signed off on the homepage and subpage concepts.  Any changes to the website navigation or architecture will be billed separately, on an hourly basis.



Please sign and fax this file to ###-###-####, and e-mail the electronic version of this file to EMAIL ADDRESS.



We look forward to working with you to ensure your web presence is out of this world!



Please call me with any questions. 





Sincerely,



NAME
